message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor " " as U

participant ":Chantier" as Chantier
participant "jmb:Artisan" as JMB
participant "q:Qualif" as Q
participant "real : Realiser" as REAL

U -> Chantier : getPayeArtisan(jmb)
activate Chantier

Chantier -> JMB : q : getQualif()
Chantier -> Q : tauxH getTauxH()

loop [ForEach real]
  Chantier -> REAL : a = getArtisan()
  opt [a == jmb]
    Chantier -> REAL : d = getDuree()
    Chantier -> Chantier : duree += d
  end
end

Chantier --> U : duree*tauxH
deactivate Chantier
@enduml
